title: Upon Doll.
content:
No question but Doll's cheeks would soon roast dry,
    Were they not basted by her either eye.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Doll.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
